extortion.description: Fullington Auto Bus Co. Inc. provides transportation services. It offers intercity scheduled line run services from central Pennsylvania to destinations in Pittsburgh, Harrisburg, and Wilkes-Barre, Pennsylvania; and Buffalo, New York. The company also provides round trip transportation, limousines, VIP cruises, and school bus contracting services, as well as gift cards. Fullington Auto Bus Co. Inc. was founded in 1908 and is based in Clearfield, Pennsylvania. As of September, 2009, Fullington Auto Bus Co. Inc. operates as a subsidiary of RATP Développement.
